label: AC-16(5)
title: Attribute Displays on Objects to Be Output

prose.en: Display security and privacy attributes in human-readable form on each object that the system transmits to output devices to identify {param:ac-16.05_odp.01} using {param:ac-16.05_odp.02}.

guidance.en: System outputs include printed pages, screens, or equivalent items. System output devices include printers, notebook computers, video displays, smart phones, and tablets. To mitigate the risk of unauthorized exposure of information (e.g., shoulder surfing), the outputs display full attribute values when unmasked by the subscriber.

prose.en: security attributes are displayed in human-readable form on each object that the system transmits to output devices to identify {param:ac-16.05_odp.01} using {param:ac-16.05_odp.02};
privacy attributes are displayed in human-readable form on each object that the system transmits to output devices to identify {param:ac-16.05_odp.01} using {param:ac-16.05_odp.02}.

objects.en: procedures addressing display of security and privacy attributes in human-readable form
special dissemination, handling, or distribution instructions
types of human-readable, standard naming conventions
system configuration settings and associated documentation
Organizational personnel with information security and privacy responsibilities
System output devices displaying security and privacy attributes in human-readable form on each object

guidelines.en: special dissemination, handling, or distribution instructions to be used for each object that the system transmits to output devices are defined;

ac-16.05_odp.01.alt-label: special dissemination, handling, or distribution instructions

guidelines.en: human-readable, standard naming conventions for the security and privacy attributes to be displayed in human-readable form on each object that the system transmits to output devices are defined;
